value: daemon.json at /Users/jeremy/Documents/gt/mayor/daemon.json must have data_dir pointing to /Users/jeremy/Documents/gt/.dolt-data (not /Users/jeremy/gt/.dolt-data). The daemon reads this at startup and uses it for auto-restart. If you see stale dolt processes at wrong path: (1) fix daemon.json data_dir, (2) kill wrong-path dolt, (3) gt daemon stop && gt daemon start to reload config, (4) gt dolt start.
